---
title: "2021 Day 13"
author: "Nathan Moore"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Write the Puzzle explanation here

```{r}

library(tidyverse)

my_file <- here::here("2021", "data-2021-13.txt")
cards <- readLines(my_file)

```

Maybe write an explanation of the solution approach here

```{r}
# here's another R cell for good luck

```

Paste part two here
